headline: AI for Employee Experience: Onboarding, Learning, and Internal Communications
description: AI is HR's most productive colleague -- onboarding new hires conversationally, recommending personalized learning, detecting disengagement before employees leave, and crafting internal communications. From Microsoft Viva to Qualtrics, AI transforms employee experience from one-size-fits-all to hyper-personalized.

citation.name: AI for Employee Experience: Onboarding Automation, Personalized Learning, and Internal Communication Analytics (2024-2025 Survey)
NLP for Employee Engagement: Sentiment Analysis, Turnover Prediction, and Voice of Employee Analytics
